message:
feat: update agent bead readers to query wisps table

Update all agent bead readers to query both the wisps table (primary,
for migrated agent beads) and the issues table (backward compat during
migration). Part of the Dolt concurrency migration (gt-bewatn.10).

Changes:
- beads_agent.go: ListAgentBeads() queries wisps first, then issues.
  Add ListAgentBeadsFromWisps() for direct wisps-only queries.
- daemon/lifecycle.go: Extract listAgentBeadsJSON() helper that queries
  both tables and merges results. Used by GUPP and orphaned work checks.
- mail/router.go: queryAgentsInDir() queries both tables for agent
  mail routing.
- doctor/wisp_check.go: countAbandonedWisps() queries wisps table via
  bd CLI instead of reading issues.jsonl, with legacy fallback.
- doctor/stale_agent_beads_check.go: Also check wisps table for
  migrated agent beads during staleness detection.
- daemon/dolt.go: Identity check queries both issues and wisps tables
  for imposter detection.

All wisps queries are best-effort with graceful fallback when the wisps
table does not exist yet (pre-migration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
